Just Keep Digging.

Your partner in conservation-focused excavating and land management. Over two decades of reshaping landscapes responsibly throughout Southwest Ohio.

Get a Free Estimate View Our Services
✓ 20+ Years Experience ✓ Conservation Focused ✓ Free Estimates ✓ Locally Owned

What We Do

Our Services

Building Pads & Fine Grading

Precision building pads and fine grading for a solid, level foundation on any construction project.

Drainage & Erosion Control

Expert water management and erosion prevention systems to protect your land and structures.

Light Clearing

Efficient vegetation and debris removal with minimal environmental impact for your next project.

Driveways

Durable driveway construction and grading for rural properties, farms, and residential access.

Ponds

Custom pond construction for recreation, irrigation, livestock, and aesthetic value.

Bush Hogging

Overgrown land clearing and ongoing vegetation management to keep your property accessible.

Basements

Precise basement excavation with careful attention to grade, drainage, and soil conditions.

Storm Work

Rapid-response storm cleanup, drainage restoration, and property protection when you need it most.

Seeding

Professional seeding and landscape restoration to stabilize soil and promote healthy regrowth.

Why Us

Why Choose Earthwise?

Two Decades of Expertise

With over twenty years in the land development industry, we bring deep knowledge and proven methods to every project — large or small.

Conservation Commitment

Every project is an opportunity to enhance and protect the environment. We implement sustainable practices that respect the land while meeting your goals.

With a Bucket or a Blade

From precision grading to heavy excavation, our versatile fleet and skilled operators can tackle any earthwork challenge on your property.

Simple Process

How It Works

01

Call or Contact Us

Reach out by phone at (513) 212-7585 or through our website to discuss your project needs.

02

Site Assessment

We visit your property, evaluate the scope, and provide a detailed, no-obligation estimate.

03

Expert Execution

Our experienced crew completes your project with precision, efficiency, and respect for the land.

04

Your Satisfaction

We follow up to ensure the finished work meets your expectations and stands the test of time.

Testimonials

What Our Clients Say

“I recently hired Earthwise Excavating for a major landscaping project, and I'm absolutely thrilled with the results. Their team's expertise in handling complex tasks like drainage and erosion control was evident from day one. Their commitment to sustainability sets them apart from any other excavating company I've worked with.”

B
Brandon Pollock

Clarksville, OH

“Joey and the Earthwise crew did an incredible job building our driveway and grading the property. They were professional, punctual, and the finished result exceeded our expectations. Highly recommend for anyone needing excavation work in the area.”

M
Mark Henderson

Wilmington, OH

“We needed a pond dug on our farm property and Earthwise knocked it out of the park. They were mindful of the surrounding landscape and delivered exactly what we envisioned. Fair pricing and great communication throughout the entire project.”

S
Sarah Mitchell

Blanchester, OH

Contact Earthwise Excavating today for a free, no-obligation consultation on your next project.
